scripts.dev: pnpm --dir ../.. hylo build examples/cloudflare-worker --backend ${HYLO_BACKEND_URL:-http://127.0.0.1:${HYLO_BACKEND_PORT:-8787}} && portless --force workflow-cloudflare-worker-example sh -c 'wrangler dev .hylo/build/src/index.ts --config .hylo/build/wrangler.toml --ip 127.0.0.1 --port "${PORT:-8788}" --inspector-port "${HYLO_CLOUDFLARE_WORKER_INSPECTOR_PORT:-9231}" --var INCIDENT_PUBLISHER_TOKEN:${INCIDENT_PUBLISHER_TOKEN:-local-dev-incident-publisher-token} --var HYLO_APP_URL:https://workflow-cloudflare-worker-example.localhost'
